Non-Custodial & Recoverable.
Only you can access your funds. You can always recover access.
Privacy-First
Nobody can link your onchain account to your identity. Kinto does not store personal information.
Gasless & Password Free
You never need to pay gas or worry about complicated seed phrases on Kinto. Period.
